items.title: Looking Back on Notre Dame’s Rout of Texas in 1995
items.summary: Some Notre Dame victories become part of college football lore. Fans can instantly recall the 1988 win over Miami, the 1993 triumph over Florida State, or the dramatic moments that defined later generations. Yet tucked away in the archives is one of the most dominant—and most overlooked—performances of the Lou Holtz era. On September 23, […]

items.title: How does the new NCAA eligibility rule affect Notre Dame Football?
items.summary: The NCAA is going to pass a new eligibility rule that will allow five years of eligibility for all players. The window for the five years will begin when the athlete turns 19 or when he enrolls in college – whichever happens first. This is good news and a nice step forward for college sports. […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: 4-Star DL Segun Alexander commits to the Irish
items.summary: Notre Dame continues to add great pieces to its 2027 football recruiting class. On Tuesday, 4-Star defensive lineman Segun Alexander gave his public commitment to Marcus Freeman and the 2027 recruiting class. The 6’2″ 300 pound defensive lineman from Rabun-Gap Nacoochee School in Rabun Gap, Georgia, chose the Irish over an impressive offer list that […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting Roundup: What’s Next for this Irish Class?
items.summary: Notre Dame is still on its football recruiting heater, and despite signing day being about five and a half months away, the overall class is pretty close to finishing up. Where Notre Dame Stands Right Now Notre Dame currently has 19 commitments for its 2027 class after Monday’s announcement by 4-Star WR, Julius Jones Jr. […]

items.title: Notre Dame DT Brenan Vernon medically retires from football
items.summary: Football is a hard sport, and it’s extremely hard on the human body. On Monday, Irish Sports Daily’s Matt Freeman reported that Notre Dame defensive lineman, Brenan Vernon, has medically retired from football. Vernon was once a prized recruit for the Irish from Mentor, Ohio, and was considered one of the absolute best players in […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: 4-Star Florida Safety Andre Jones commits to the Irish
items.summary: It must’ve been a GREAT Father’s Day for former Notre Dame running back, Julius Jones. On Monday, his 4-Star WR son Julius Jones Jr. committed to Notre Dame’s 2027 football recruiting class, and then shortly thereafter, his 4-Star Safety son Andre Jones committed to Notre Dame’s 2028 football recruiting class. Talk about keeping up with […]
